name: Indu
overview: Huge mansions have heinous secrets. As clandestine family ties, scandals and uncanny deaths spiral around the dark hallways of Indu's home, she leaves no stone unturned to untangle the mystery.

trailers.title: Official Trailer | Indu (ইন্দু) 2 | Ishaa Saha | Sahana Dutta | 20th Jan | hoichoi
